ocr_findings.description: The トランザクション flow diagram (太郎→出金処理→入金処理→花子, with トランザクション bracket below) is referenced as '![トランザクション](page_464_figure_01.jpeg)' in the cleaned output. Diagram label text (出金処理, 入金処理, トランザクション, 太郎, 花子) is absent from OCR body text.

Page footer '448' and section header '12-02 データ管理とファイルシステム' plus chapter sidebar '第12章 ソフトウェア' appear at the end of the cleaned output rather than in their original page positions. Layout normalization artifact.

reviewer_notes: Content page explaining トランザクション管理 (section 2 of DBMS features). All prose including the 出金処理/入金処理 example, the definition of コミット, and the key bold terms are accurately captured by the Claude-Vision cleaned pass. Figure is referenced by filename rather than image-placeholder, which is an improvement over Mistral OCR. Footer/header position artifacts are cosmetic.
